positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical celestial botanical arrangement suitable for apparel printing. The central element is a stylized lunar moth interwoven with bioluminescent jungle leaves and delicate constellations. The design must have a strong, clean silhouette and circular composition, maximizing negative space for impact. Use a sophisticated neo-art nouveau illustrative style, featuring deep indigo blues, midnight blacks, and contrasting glowing gold and teal accents. The aesthetic combines precise, engraved linework with subtle, rich watercolor washes. Central composition, high contrast, perfect print resolution, studio lighting.
